content.question: The degree to which small-class peer effects (which favor disadvantaged pupils) versus economies of scale (which favor consolidation) net out in Hungarian rural contexts is unknown; no cost-benefit or randomized trial exists for this trade-off in Hungary.
content.reduction_path: Comparative cost-effectiveness research on multi-grade rural school models vs. consolidated hub-school models in Hungary, ideally with value-added test data or matched cohort outcomes; or a randomized pilot program allowing some municipalities to maintain small schools while others consolidate.
